# Learn AI by Rajul Babel

> Learn AI end-to-end: how it works inside, and how to build with it. Covers Model Internals, RAG, Vector Databases, and Agent Frameworks.

**Author:** Rajul Babel
**Site:** https://rajulbabel.github.io/learn-ai/
**Source:** https://github.com/rajulbabel/learn-ai

## About

An interactive, visual, free guide to AI built by Rajul Babel. The site teaches AI from first principles to production systems through progressive sub-step reveals, real numbers, real formulas, and side-by-side diagrams. No watered-down explanations - every concept is shown at full depth.

## What it covers

- **Neural Network Foundations** - neurons, layers, weights, biases, activations, forward/backward pass, gradient descent, dropout, Adam, weight init.
- **How LLMs Train** - tokenization, self-supervised learning, cross-entropy loss, autoregressive generation, SFT, RLHF, DPO.
- **Scaling & Modern Techniques** - scaling laws, batch training, distillation, CLIP, the full training pipeline.
- **Road to Transformers** - CNN, RNN, RNN's flaws, the Transformer.
- **Transformer Input Pipeline** - embeddings, positional encoding (sinusoidal & RoPE).
- **Attention** - Q, K, V intuition; full attention computation; multi-head attention; masking; cross-attention.
- **Encoder & Decoder** - Add & Norm, FFN, residuals, pre-norm vs post-norm, batch norm vs layer norm.
- **Modern LLM Techniques** - KV cache, grouped-query attention, mixture of experts, reasoning models.
- **Vector Databases** - kNN, ANN, HNSW, IVF, Vamana, scalar/product/binary quantization, Matryoshka, IVF-PQ, HNSW+PQ, hybrid search, rerankers, ColBERT-style multi-vector retrieval, observability, capacity planning, FAISS, pgvector, Qdrant, Pinecone, Weaviate, Milvus, Chroma.
- **Building with AI** - RAG, Vector DB selection, Agent Frameworks (LangGraph), embedding lifecycle, production deployment.

## Author

Rajul Babel.
- GitHub: https://github.com/rajulbabel
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rajulbabel
